name: set_reference
description: Set a document as the reference (baseline) document for comparison within a project. All subsequent comparisons will use this document as the standard.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

document_id.description: The document ID to set as the reference (baseline) document

name: compare
description: Compare a target document against the reference document and identify metadata mismatches including entities (people, organizations, dates, amounts), key terms, and structural differences. Returns a detailed mismatch report with severity levels.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project

target_document_id.description: The document ID to compare against the reference

reference_document_id.description: Optional override for the reference document ID. If not provided, uses the project's designated reference document.

fields.description: Optional list of specific fields to compare (e.g., ['dates', 'amounts', 'parties']). If not provided, compares all available metadata.
